projects.title: PhishGuard AI
projects.description: An AI-powered phishing detection platform with real-time URL scanning, malware awareness, and a live threat dashboard. Built with React.js and ML-based detection logic.

projects.title: SmartDash Analytics
projects.description: A modern analytics dashboard featuring real-time data visualization, interactive charts, and a clean dark UI. Built with React and custom chart components.

projects.title: Developer Portfolio
projects.description: The very portfolio you are viewing! Built with React + Vite, Three.js for 3D elements, Framer Motion for animations, and deployed on GitHub Pages.
